# eatGets

## Overview

With the help of `eatGets`, the national data sets of the large scale
assessments, which can be applied for at the Research Data Center of the
Institute for Educational Quality Improvement in Germany
([FDZ](https://www.iqb.hu-berlin.de/fdz/)), can be compared with the
international data sets, which can be downloaded directly from the
respective project websites.

`eatGets` builds on [`eatGADS`](https://github.com/beckerbenj/eatGADS).

## Installation

``` r

# Install stable version from CRAN via
install.packages("eatGets")

# Install development version from GitHub via
remotes::install_github("ruckeran/eatGets")
```

## Usage

The functionality of `eatGets` will be documented in a vignette in the
future. If you have questions regarding existing functionality or
requests for new features, contact the package author.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`download_icils()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_icils.md)
  : Download and import an empty FDZ file.
- [`download_icils_iea()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_icils_iea.md)
  : Download and import an empty ICILS public use file.
- [`download_iglu()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_iglu.md)
  : Download and import an empty FDZ file.
- [`download_iglu_iea()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_iglu_iea.md)
  : Download and import an empty IGLU public use file.
- [`download_pisa()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_pisa.md)
  : Download and import an empty FDZ file.
- [`download_pisa_oecd()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_pisa_oecd.md)
  : Download and import an empty PISA public use file.
- [`download_timss()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_timss.md)
  : Download and import an empty FDZ file.
- [`download_timss_iea()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_timss_iea.md)
  : Download and import an empty TIMSS public use file.
- [`download_tvd()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_tvd.md)
  : Download and import an empty FDZ file.
- [`download_tvd_oecd()`](https://ruckeran.github.io/eatGets/reference/download_tvd_oecd.md)
  : Download and import an empty TVD public use file.
